# Metamorphosis — Ivette Private Wellness OS

This app is a private personal wellness second brain for Ivette Milo.

Core routes:
- /app: Today dashboard
- /app/journal: reflection capture
- /app/habits: rituals
- /app/recipes: recipe upload, his-and-hers recipe builder, private cookbook
- /app/meal-plans: daily/weekly meal planning and grocery list export
- /app/music: audio library
- /app/brain: second-brain capture/search
- /app/insights: nutrition and weekly review

Machine-readable agent contracts:
- /AGENTS.md
- /PRODUCT_TRUTH.md
- /FEATURE_COMPLETENESS_GATE.md
- /DATA_SAFETY.md
- /agent-api/tools.json
- /agent-api/openapi.yaml

Agent rules:
- Do not present the product as a public SaaS first.
- Do not add public pricing unless requested.
- Prioritize private wellness tracking, recipes, nutrition memory, meal planning, and second-brain functions.
- Tailscale, MCP, and external API access require auth and audit logs before activation.
- Destructive operations require confirmation.
